title: Agents, Workflows, and the Control Loop · Guided Harness Build
summary: Compare a fixed workflow with an adaptive tool-using agent. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of an agent-system boundary map while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish predefined workflows from model-directed agents and choose the simpler sufficient architecture.
Model the observe, decide, act, and verify cycle with explicit state transitions.
Separate model context, application state, external state, and durable records.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
